sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86000" key="pothriokle/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποτηριοκλέπτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n86000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cup-stealer,</tr_> title of poem by Euphorio.</sense> </entryFree>
